text.message: You absolutely didn't? the 9 5 10 is wayy better there. You would've had a super strong sheep port
so no tree or brick and a lvl 3 stone ?
that would be so nice, no devs and no road
You'd had a whole bunch of devs lol. Would just need to get to the sheep port
alot of devs with a lvl 3 stone ?
But like, did you expect the 6 5 12 to be open?
With that huge wheat port right there?
now i will do whatever i can to stop you
Mature means the opposite of childish. Here, it was used ironically
If you truly believed that the 6 5 12 or 6 11 12 would be open, you clearly have no clue whatsoever lol
You would've taken that in my position?
only thing that can change my target is blue
if he dont get that its orange vs blue, like he just did
ok,l lets go for blue then
its you vs orange, and you block 3 stone
Think you'll have to play them
now you give blue such space
Which spot would you have taken for second placement if you were me?
brick port with much better production, or gamble for wheat port
I don't have the sheep port
And "gamble" for wheat port. I'm the most likely to get it. You going for it makes no sense even
also you need alot of wheat, so its better with brick and 3-1 port
next time, dont let blue get free map
you do get that 9,10,5 would be a better spot ?
so blue dont get insane spots ?
you have literally zero clue, man
ofc, i got about 70% win in this game
you would win if you took 9,10,5
My dude. It is 100% obvious that blue wins this. What are you talking about?
why get an early useless wheatport
when you vould have brick and 3-1
And you griefing me all game is a huge contributor to that
He has an 11 brick and should never have been able to expand like this
iwhat a joke of game...and usless talk
but you gave him free win
so u lost to a guy with 22%
You're welcome, blue. Happy to give you a free win
